francophone.excerpt: Le Canada, un des trois pays hôtes, a dû patienter jusqu'au temps additionnel pour prendre le meilleur sur les Sud-Africains, dimanche, en seizièmes de finale.

anglophone.title: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
anglophone.excerpt: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy machinery to arrive.

anglophone.title: In Venezuela, silence has become a rescue tool
anglophone.excerpt: In Venezuela rescue crews now stop almost everything and ask for silence so they can hear anyone still alive underneath the rubble. NPR's Eyder Peralta reports from the port city of La Guaira.

anglophone.title: A bridge to Canada may be blocked by the Trump administration
anglophone.excerpt: The Gordie Howe bridge spans the most important border crossing between the U.S. and Canada. President Donald Trump has said he doesn't want it open yet.

anglophone.title: Europe's heatwave linked to 1,300 deaths, WHO says, as Germany hits record 41.7C
anglophone.excerpt: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus warned that Europe is not prepared for high temperatures.

anglophone.title: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France
anglophone.excerpt: The pilot and 10 passengers - including five first-time parachutists - died in the incident, local officials said.

anglophone.title: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes, underscoring the fragility of the ceasefire
anglophone.excerpt: President Trump accused Iran of violating their framework agreement, and Tehran threatened to halt negotiations with the U.S. entirely. Meanwhile, violence continued between Israel and Hezbollah.

anglophone.title: Three firefighters die battling huge wildfires on Colorado-Utah border

anglophone.title: Trade tensions shake up Brazil's caipirinha spirit

anglophone.title: These church members disagree on politics. Together they're wiping out medical debt

anglophone.title: Win the family cookout with perfectly cooked hot dogs

anglophone.title: Tips for taking care of your pets when fireworks are booming
